title: Reflection Transition A/B own rotY curves — asymmetric stack with group rotation
goal: Movements/Reflection: Transition A and B carry OWN rotation-Y curves (drop-zone keyframes) that stack asymmetrically with the parent Group's Y-rotation link. Verify against the .motr: at t=0.717 the trace_layers m3x3 for Transition A shows a non-trivial local rotY (m8=0.55 => ~33 deg) that is NOT purely the group's link-driven angle. The GT wedge could be shape from A rotating DIFFERENTLY than B. Decode both panels' curves and confirm they combine correctly (Motion transform-order is T(pos)*R*S*T(-anchor)). DoD: Reflection >14.23 with 0 regressions. Diagnostic: FCT_XFORM=1 FCT_SLUG=Movements__Reflection tsx test/_trace_layers.ts at 5+ frames.
